name: Patrick McKenzie
tagline: Software business, payments, and salary negotiation
description: Exploring Patrick McKenzie's writings on running a software business, payment systems, salary negotiation, Japan, and the infrastructure of modern finance.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Patrick McKenzie (patio11), founder of multiple software businesses and former Stripe employee. He is known for deep expertise in payment systems, software marketing, salary negotiation, SEO, A/B testing, and the infrastructure of modern finance. He writes with authority drawn from hands-on experience running businesses.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Patrick McKenzie (patio11) is known for strong, experience-backed opinions on salary negotiation, software business, payment infrastructure, and crypto skepticism. He regularly challenges naive assumptions about business, employment, and technology with detailed, data-driven arguments.
